raw.message: Upgrade your bot, dominate the arena, win glory!

hook.summary: Fast-paced mech combat resulting in immediate kill feedback.
hook.visual_action: A heavy mech fires dual gatling guns at an enemy robot in a mountain arena, triggering a 'KILL' notification.

scene_flow: Player mech engages an enemy robot with heavy machine gun fire in a rocky valley.
Enemy is destroyed, displaying a large 'KILL' UI overlay and triggering a deep voiceover.
Player continues firing at a second target, achieving a 'DOUBLE KILL' notification.
The screen cuts to a black background with a high-contrast 'INSTALL NOW' call to action.
audience_proxy: Mid-core to hardcore male gamers interested in tactical mech warfare and high-intensity shooters.
